metadata.description: Distribution marketplace for the orchestrator-loop plugin.

plugins.name: orchestrator-loop
plugins.description: Reusable agentic-engineering framework: the rules->roadmap->PRD->handoff->verify loop plus its guardrails AND epistemics (skepticism, OOF+FDR rigor, forensic verification, honesty), app-agnostic. Bring your own app-profile + connectors.
